2606.09278.title: Internalizing Geometric Law: Learning from Solver Residuals for Precision-Critical Generation
2606.09278.paper_summary: Large Language Models frequently hallucinate in precision-critical domains such as technical diagramming and mechanical design, where outputs must satisfy strict geometric constraints. We study open-ended geometric synthesis from natural language: translating free-form descriptions into precise constructions whose entities must simultaneously satisfy dozens of interacting constraints. To make this tractable, we release PyGeoX, a programmable geometric DSL that compiles declarative constraints into a differentiable loss, and PyGeoX-Bench, a stratified suite of 300 problems with per-constraint verifiable rewards. Using PyGeoX as a verifier, we identify a failure mode we call Outlier Gradient Masking: under global-norm rewards (any scheme that aggregates residuals through a single norm, for example, $\exp(-\mathrm{MSE})$), a single outlier constraint can nullify the learning signal across all others. To address this, we propose Saturating Additive Rewards (SAR), which decompose the reward into bounded per-constraint terms, preserving partial progress and ensuring consistent gradients even under severe violations. Against MSE-based rewards, the natural baseline for geometry solvers, SAR improves the hard-tier solving rate by $2.3\times$, and the resulting 8B model is competitive with much larger frontier systems on this benchmark. We release the engine, benchmark, and data at https://github.com/Huawei-AI4Math/PyGeoX.
2606.09278.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型在精確性至關重要的領域，如技術圖示和機械設計中，經常出現幻覺，因為輸出必須滿足嚴格的幾何約束。<lb/>我們研究從自然語言進行開放式幾何合成：將自由形式的描述轉換為精確的構造，這些構造的實體必須同時滿足數十個相互作用的約束。<lb/>為了使這一過程可行，我們發布了PyGeoX，一種可編程的幾何DSL，將聲明性約束編譯為可微分的損失，還有PyGeoX-Bench，一個分層的300個問題的套件，具有每個約束可驗證的獎勵。<lb/>使用PyGeoX作為驗證器，我們識別出一種失效模式，稱為異常梯度屏蔽：在全局範數獎勵下（任何通過單一範數聚合殘差的方案，例如，$\exp(-\mathrm{MSE})$），單一的異常約束可以使所有其他約束的學習信號失效。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了飽和加法獎勵（SAR），它將獎勵分解為有界的每個約束項，保留部分進展並確保即使在嚴重違反的情況下也能保持一致的梯度。<lb/>與基於MSE的獎勵相比，這是幾何求解器的自然基準，SAR將難度高的求解率提高了$2.3\times$，而最終的8B模型在這一基準上與更大的前沿系統具有競爭力。<lb/>我們在 https://github.com/Huawei-AI4Math/PyGeoX 上發布了引擎、基準和數據。
2606.09278.author: Rafael Cabral et.al.
2606.09278.authors: Rafael Cabral, Pang Zixi, Ziyi Shou, Shen Xin
